title: Pivot table not working upto

posts.author: networkingexpress (Alpesh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The pivot table isn’t functioning as expected. It’s missing a basic requirement—we need it to calculate the sum of values grouped by the Date column for entries with the same Name

What are you trying to achieve

The pivot table isn’t functioning as expected. It’s missing a basic requirement—we need it to calculate the sum of values grouped by the Date column for entries with the same Name

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Alpesh! Shannon here with the monday team. Thank you so much for submitting your feature request. I want to make sure the Product team has a full understanding of your use case to further contextualize how we can improve the pivot table feature.

You shared that you’d like to calculate the sum of values when grouping the table by Date Column and for entries of the same name. Can you please share how you have filtered and structured your pivot table? For example, does it look similar to this setup:

image1551×429 32.8 KB

Ideally, are you looking for entries of the same name to merge values in the table? Any additional context you can share would be super helpful!
